_._: A stocky woman in her forties, guard captain's badge on her collar, standing at the watch room window with arms folded.

1.1: Short grey hair under a leather cap. Square jaw. A nose broken and reset at least twice. Chain shirt visible under the guard tabard — she wears armour on duty, always.
1.2: Carries a short sword and a weighted truncheon. The truncheon has seen more use. Stands with weight forward, watching the harbour road.

2._: Captain Harren. Commands the Thornkeep watch — six guards on rotating pairs. Posted here eight years. Knows every face that comes up from the harbour.
2.1: Methodical. Logs every arrival. Cross-references cargo manifests with trader permits. Has caught three smuggling operations by noticing discrepancies in paperwork.
2.2: Tough but fair. Will give a stranger the benefit of the doubt exactly once. Second offences get the lockup. Third offences get escorted to the southern road.

3: Purpose: keep Thornkeep orderly and her guards alive. Concerned about the increased tolls at Greymarch — it's pushing desperate traders through Thornkeep who might otherwise go around.
